steps.title: Find the slope of the given line
steps.content: The line $$y = 8x + 2$$ is in slope‑intercept form $$y = mx + b$$ with slope $m = 8$. Because parallel lines share the same slope, line $l$ also has slope \$8$.

steps.title: Write equation of line l through origin
steps.content: Line $l$ passes through the origin $(0,0)$ and has slope \$8$. Using slope‑intercept form $$y = mx + b$$ with $m=8$ and $b=0$ gives $$y = 8x$$.

steps.title: Compute d using point (3,d)
steps.content:
Substitute the coordinates $(3,d)$ into $$y = 8x$$: $$d = 8 \cdot 3 = 24$$.
That matches choice B — B is correct.
